text: Hello. Hello. Hi, this is Chelsea. We pulled up your Medicare profile and there's a note showing your 2026 update hasn't been confirmed yet. We just need a quick confirmation so your coverage doesn't get interrupted. Do you have both part A and part B? No. Sorry, it looks like you don't qualify for the plans. Have a great day. [BLANK_AUDIO]
